title: 1M Atom Scale Test
subtitle: FCC Cu generated scale test.

title: LUPI Live QR Molecule
subtitle: A standards-derived QR code translated into a dense carbon atom grid that scans to https://lupi.live from a clean top view.

metadata.method: Phone-Readable QR Matrix to Atomic XYZ

title: Atomized Pulse Grid
subtitle: A six-frame image sequence translated into a stable atom lattice for molecular point-art playback.

title: Lupine Sphere Grid
subtitle: Live knowledge graph of the Lupine ecosystem — 6 spheres, 635 nodes, 1238 edges — rendered as a molecule. Sphere colors the cluster; node kind scales the atom.

metadata.method: Lupine Wiki Knowledge Graph → Molecular Structure

title: Cu Potential Benchmark
subtitle: NIST evaluation of 9 interatomic potentials. Max error: 83.1%. Color by error to see where potentials fail.

title: Fe Potential Benchmark
subtitle: NIST evaluation of 11 interatomic potentials. Max error: 123.8%. Color by error to see where potentials fail.

title: Time-Series Oscillation
subtitle: Test dataset for 60fps property interpolation

metadata.reference: Used to validate playback extrapolation logic.

title: Ni Vacancy Diffusion Playthrough
subtitle: CHGNet Langevin MD of a Ni vacancy — 11 measured frames, interpolated on playback for smooth motion.

metadata.reference: Recovered MLIP long-run viewer artifact; 11 CHGNet-measured frames.

title: Mg HCP Slip Playthrough
subtitle: CHGNet MD of HCP Mg slip — 13 measured frames, interpolated on playback for smooth motion.

metadata.reference: Recovered MLIP long-run viewer artifact; 13 CHGNet-measured frames.

title: LiFePO4 Ion Channel Playthrough
subtitle: CHGNet MD of Li-channel motion in LiFePO4 — 9 measured frames, interpolated on playback for smooth motion.

metadata.reference: Recovered MLIP long-run viewer artifact; 9 CHGNet-measured frames.

title: Cantor Alloy Dislocation Glide
subtitle: W. Curtin et al. (Nature 2023): Edge dislocation mobility in CoCrFeMnNi High-Entropy Alloy using MLIP.

metadata.reference: Deep learning potential reveals cross-slip mechanisms in Cantor alloy.

title: LLZO Solid Electrolyte Ion Dynamics
subtitle: G. Ceder et al. (Nature Materials 2024): Correlated Li-ion diffusion pathways in garnet-type solid electrolytes.

metadata.reference: Analysis of concerted migration events in Li7La3Zr2O12.

title: ZIF-8 Gate-Opening Transition
subtitle: F.X. Coudert et al. (Science 2023): Mechanical flexibility and gas-induced phase transition in Metal-Organic Frameworks.

metadata.method: Classical MD with flexible force field
metadata.reference: Adsorption-induced breathing and swing transitions in ZIF-8.

title: Tungsten Collision Cascade
subtitle: A.E. Sand et al. (PRL 2022): Primary radiation damage and defect clustering in plasma-facing materials.

metadata.reference: 150 keV primary knock-on atom (PKA) cascade evolution over 20 ps.

title: GST Phase-Change Crystallization
subtitle: S.R. Elliott et al. (Nature Comms 2024): Ultrafast nucleation in Ge2Sb2Te5 memory materials.

metadata.reference: Tracking the amorphous-to-cubic phase transition via homonuclear bonds.

title: Buckminsterfullerene
subtitle: C60 Truncated Icosahedron: The iconic carbon allotrope discovered by Kroto, Smalley, and Curl.

title: Carbon Nanotube
subtitle: (6,6) Armchair Single-Walled Carbon Nanotube.

title: Graphene Nanoribbon
subtitle: Armchair Graphene Nanoribbon with Hydrogen-passivated edges.

title: Ice/Water Cluster
subtitle: A generated cluster of 64 water molecules.

title: Cu₆₄Zr₃₆ Metallic Glass
subtitle: Melt-quench simulation showing glass transition and short-range order

title: Al Polycrystal (Voronoi)
subtitle: Grain boundary structure in FCC aluminum with Σ5 misorientation

title: Cu(100) slab melting
subtitle: Copper slab heated 300→1700 K. Melting nucleates at the free surfaces near Tm (~1340 K for Cu_u3) and the disorder front propagates inward until the crystal dissolves.

metadata.method: LAMMPS MD, NVT (timestep 0.002 ps, dump every 700 steps)

title: Liquid Cu rapid quench
subtitle: Bulk liquid copper quenched 2000→300 K at ~4×10^13 K/s — far too fast for crystallization, so the melt vitrifies into an amorphous solid.

metadata.method: LAMMPS MD, NVT (timestep 0.002 ps, dump every 600 steps)

title: Cu nanoparticle sintering
subtitle: Two misoriented copper nanoparticles at 1000 K (0.75 Tm) coalesce: a neck forms by surface diffusion and grows, with a grain boundary where the lattice orientations meet.

metadata.method: LAMMPS MD, NVT (timestep 0.002 ps, dump every 933 steps)
